name: MEGASync – Configuration and Account Info
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for commonly abused tools with specific registry footprints: PsExec (temporary service key on target), FileZilla (FTP exfiltration), MEGASync (cloud exfiltration with autorun), Advanced IP Scanner (writes even as portable; operational history including scanned IP ranges), and NetSupport Manager (RMM abused as RAT). Includes artifact tips and companion file artifacts.
description: [MEGASync] MEGASync cloud storage client per-user configuration including account email, sync folder paths, and session tokens.
forensic_value: Account email or username reveals the MEGA account used for sync — critical for exfiltration attribution. Sync folder paths reveal what local directories were synced to MEGA cloud storage. Session token may allow account access for further investigation via MEGA's API.
